text: Your brain is constantly rewiring itself — but how? This phenomenon is called neuroplasticity. Each skill you practice strengthens your brain’s connections. Imagine playing the piano or mastering a new language. Each repetition reshapes your neural pathways. Studies in cognitive neuroscience reveal this process is rooted in Hebbian learning: 'cells that fire together, wire together.' But, there are limits to this plasticity in adults. While the brain can change, it takes time and practice. So, what skill will you practice today? Hit like if you're ready to rewire your brain!
